payload.answer: I did not commit the article’s contents because the fetch failed with a 404; only the request/failure context was retained.
payload.decision: Do not store article content because it was not retrievable; retain only the fetch-failure context as a low-confidence operational note.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL is not a known persistent entity in memory; only the failed-fetch context is available, so no durable entity merge is warranted.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether to commit durable memory for a requested article reference when the fetch result was a 404 network error.

memory_cards.statement: A request was made to remember an article at https://example.com/missing, but the fetch returned a 404 network error.

details: Fetch attempted for requested article URL.
Only failure context retained with low confidence.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL if it becomes available.
If the article content is provided later, create a new memory card from the supplied text.
If this was a placeholder URL, replace it with the correct source before retrying.

raw_text: {"intent":"Evaluate whether to commit durable memory for a requested article reference when the fetch result was a 404 network error.","decision":"Do not store article content because it was not retrievable; retain only the fetch-failure context as a low-confidence operational note.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"event","statement":"A request was made to remember an article at https://example.com/missing, but the fetch returned a 404 network error.","confidence":"low","entities":[{"name":"https://example.com/missing","type":"url","role":"requested article URL"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"https://example.com/missing","predicate":"fetch_result","object":"404 network error"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"create","entity_id":null,"reason":"The URL is not a known persistent entity in memory; only the failed-fetch context is available, so no durable entity merge is warranted."},"conflict_classification":"no_conflict_unavailable_content","answer":"I did not commit the article’s contents because the fetch failed with a 404; only the request/failure context was retained.","citations":["https://example.com/missing"],"repair_options":["Retry fetching the URL if it becomes available.","If the article content is provided later, create a new memory card from the supplied text.","If this was a placeholder URL, replace it with the correct source before retrying."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Fetch attempted for requested article URL.","Fetch returned 404 network error.","No article content stored.","Only failure context retained with low confidence."]}}
